who: HR administrators in medical clinics processing 10–20 claims/month
offer: For HR administrators in medical clinics processing 10–20 claims/month, discrepancies cause delayed reimbursements. We simplify tracking and reconciliation instead of manual tracking and reconciliation of claims.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR administrators
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to HR administrators with demo video
Community forums where HR administrators share tools
try_it: Let users try claim discrepancy alert system on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in a relevant community
